creator: bruce@freebsd.zuhause.org
text:
Update the JRuby port from 1.5.6 (released 3 December 2010) to 1.6.3 (released 7 July 2011).
	This port contains greatly improved Ruby 1.9.2 support.  I submitted an earlier patch which
	did not include an updated pkg-plist file.

Fix: Patch to Makefile, distinfo and pkg-plist included below.
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
